# CSPR.Cloud.Net - Complete Usage Guide

## What Is This?
A .NET client library for the CSPR Cloud API - access Casper blockchain data (Mainnet & Testnet) with type-safe methods, filtering, sorting, pagination, and a WebSocket Streaming API.

**Targets:** .NET Standard 2.0 & 2.1 (compatible with .NET Core, .NET 5+, .NET Framework 4.6.1+)

**Current version: 2.0.0** — tracks CSPR Cloud API through v2.9.0. See the README's Release Notes for the full v2.0.0 surface and breaking changes (notably: balance/stake fields migrated from `ulong?` to `string` to avoid uint64 overflow on large accounts; `SupplyData.Timestamp` is a Unix-seconds `long?`).

## Installation
```bash
dotnet add package CSPR.Cloud.Net
```

## Quick Start
```csharp
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Clients;
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Objects.Config;

// Initialize with your API key
var config = new CasperCloudClientConfig("your-api-key");
var client = new CasperCloudRestClient(config);

// Use Mainnet or Testnet
var account = await client.Mainnet.Account.GetAccountAsync("01abc...");
var validators = await client.Testnet.Validator.GetValidatorsAsync(new ValidatorsRequestParameters());
```

## Available Endpoints
Access via `client.Mainnet.{Endpoint}` or `client.Testnet.{Endpoint}`:

| Endpoint | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `.Account` | Account data and info |
| `.Auction` | Auction metrics |
| `.AwaitingDeploy` | Awaiting deploys (multisig workflows) |
| `.Bidder` | Bidder/staking data |
| `.Block` | Block information |
| `.CentralizedAccount` | Exchange/service account info |
| `.Contract` | Smart contracts and packages |
| `.CsprName` | CSPR.name resolution |
| `.Delegate` | Delegations and rewards (account, validator, purse) |
| `.Deploy` | Deploy transactions |
| `.Dex` | DEX platforms |
| `.FT` | Fungible tokens, rates, and actions |
| `.NFT` | Non-fungible tokens (CEP-47, CEP-78, CEP-95) |
| `.Rate` | CSPR currency rates |
| `.Supply` | Token supply data |
| `.Swap` | Fungible token trades/swaps |
| `.Transfer` | CSPR transfers (account, deploy, purse) |
| `.Validator` | Validator info, performance, and era rewards |

---

## API Methods

### Account
```csharp
// Get single account
var account = await client.Mainnet.Account.GetAccountAsync("01publicKey...");

// Get single account with optional data
var account = await client.Mainnet.Account.GetAccountAsync("01publicKey...",
    new AccountsOptionalParameters { DelegatedBalance = true, AccountInfo = true });

// Get multiple accounts with filtering, sorting, pagination
var accounts = await client.Mainnet.Account.GetAccountsAsync(new AccountsRequestParameters
{
    PageNumber = 1,
    PageSize = 50,
    FilterParameters = new AccountsFilterParameters
    {
        AccountHashes = new List<string> { "account-hash-abc...", "account-hash-def..." }
    },
    SortingParameters = new AccountsSortingParameters
    {
        OrderByBalance = true,
        SortType = SortType.Descending
    },
    OptionalParameters = new AccountsOptionalParameters
    {
        AuctionStatus = true,
        StakedBalance = true
    }
});

// Get account info (extended metadata)
var info = await client.Mainnet.Account.GetAccountInfoAsync("account-hash-abc...");

// Get multiple account infos
var infos = await client.Mainnet.Account.GetAccountInfosAsync(new AccountInfosRequestParameters());
```

### Block
```csharp
// Get block by hash
var block = await client.Mainnet.Block.GetBlockAsync("block-hash...");

// Get blocks with pagination
var blocks = await client.Mainnet.Block.GetBlocksAsync(new BlockRequestParameters
{
    PageNumber = 1,
    PageSize = 25,
    SortingParameters = new BlockSortingParameters
    {
        OrderByHeight = true,
        SortType = SortType.Descending
    }
});

// Get blocks filtered by era and switch block status
var switchBlocks = await client.Mainnet.Block.GetBlocksAsync(new BlockRequestParameters
{
    FilterParameters = new BlockFilterParameters
    {
        EraId = "12345",
        IsSwitchBlock = true
    }
});

// Get blocks proposed by a validator
var validatorBlocks = await client.Mainnet.Block.GetValidatorBlocksAsync(
    "01validatorPublicKey...",
    new BlockRequestParameters());
```

### Validator
```csharp
// Get single validator
var validator = await client.Mainnet.Validator.GetValidatorAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new ValidatorRequestParameters());

// Get all validators
var validators = await client.Mainnet.Validator.GetValidatorsAsync(new ValidatorsRequestParameters
{
    PageSize = 100,
    FilterParameters = new ValidatorsFilterParameters
    {
        IsActive = true
    },
    SortingParameters = new ValidatorsSortingParameters
    {
        OrderByTotalStake = true,
        SortType = SortType.Descending
    },
    OptionalParameters = new ValidatorsOptionalParameters
    {
        AccountInfo = true,
        CsprName = true                  // v2.1.0 — pull each validator's CSPR.name when available
    }
});

// Get validator performance history
var performance = await client.Mainnet.Validator.GetHistoricalValidatorPerformanceAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new ValidatorHistoricalPerformanceRequestParameters());

// Get validator rewards with era-range filter (v2.4.0) and CSPR.name includer (v2.1.0)
var rewards = await client.Mainnet.Validator.GetValidatorRewardsAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new ValidatorRewardsRequestParameters
    {
        FilterParameters = new ValidatorRewardsFilterParameters
        {
            FromEraId = "21900",
            ToEraId = "21950"
        },
        OptionalParameters = new ValidatorRewardsOptionalParameters
        {
            Rate = 1,
            CsprName = true
        }
    });

// Get total rewards
var totalRewards = await client.Mainnet.Validator.GetValidatorTotalRewardsAsync("01publicKey...");

// Get validator era rewards (aggregated by era)
var eraRewards = await client.Mainnet.Validator.GetValidatorEraRewardsAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new ValidatorEraRewardsRequestParameters
    {
        FilterParameters = new ValidatorRewardsFilterParameters
        {
            FromEraId = "21900",
            ToEraId = "21950"
        },
        SortingParameters = new ValidatorRewardsSortingParameters { OrderByEraId = true },
        OptionalParameters = new ValidatorRewardsOptionalParameters { Rate = 1 }
    });
```

### Deploy
```csharp
// Get single deploy
var deploy = await client.Mainnet.Deploy.GetDeployAsync("deploy-hash...");

// Get deploys with filtering
var deploys = await client.Mainnet.Deploy.GetDeploysAsync(new DeploysRequestParameters
{
    FilterParameters = new DeploysFilterParameters
    {
        CallerPublicKey = "01abc..."
    }
});

// Get account's deploys
var accountDeploys = await client.Mainnet.Deploy.GetAccountDeploysAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new AccountDeploysRequestParameters());

// Get block's deploys
var blockDeploys = await client.Mainnet.Deploy.GetBlockDeploysAsync(
    "block-hash...",
    new BlockDeploysRequestParameters());

// Get deploy execution types
var types = await client.Mainnet.Deploy.GetDeployExecutionTypesAsync();
```

### Delegate
```csharp
// Get account's delegations
var delegations = await client.Mainnet.Delegate.GetAccountDelegationsAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new DelegationRequestParameters());

// Get account's PENDING undelegations (v2.0.0 SDK / v2.5.1 API) — funds in the 7-era unbonding window
var pending = await client.Mainnet.Delegate.GetAccountUndelegationsAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new DelegationRequestParameters());
// Returns PaginatedResponse<UndelegationData>
// Includes DelegatorIdentifier + DelegatorIdentifierTypeId (0 = account, 1 = purse — v2.1.0 purse delegations)

// Get validator's delegators
var delegators = await client.Mainnet.Delegate.GetValidatorDelegationsAsync(
    "01validatorPublicKey...",
    new DelegationRequestParameters());

// Get delegator rewards
var rewards = await client.Mainnet.Delegate.GetAccountDelegatorRewardsAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new AccountDelegatorRewardRequestParameters());

// Get total delegation rewards
var total = await client.Mainnet.Delegate.GetTotalAccountDelegationRewardsAsync("01publicKey...");

// Get purse delegations
var purseDelegations = await client.Mainnet.Delegate.GetPurseDelegationsAsync(
    "uref-abc...-007",
    new DelegationRequestParameters());

// Get purse delegation rewards
var purseRewards = await client.Mainnet.Delegate.GetPurseDelegationRewardsAsync(
    "uref-abc...-007",
    new AccountDelegatorRewardRequestParameters());

// Get total purse delegation rewards
var purseTotal = await client.Mainnet.Delegate.GetTotalPurseDelegationRewardsAsync("uref-abc...-007");
```

### Transfer
```csharp
// Get account transfers
var transfers = await client.Mainnet.Transfer.GetAccountTransfersAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new TransferAccountRequestParameters
    {
        SortingParameters = new TransferSortingParameters
        {
            OrderByTimestamp = true,
            SortType = SortType.Descending
        }
    });

// Get deploy transfers
var deployTransfers = await client.Mainnet.Transfer.GetDeployTransfersAsync(
    "deploy-hash...",
    new TransferDeployRequestParameters());

// Get purse transfers
var purseTransfers = await client.Mainnet.Transfer.GetPurseTransfersAsync(
    "uref-abc...-007",
    new TransferAccountRequestParameters());
```

### Contract
```csharp
// Get contract by hash
var contract = await client.Mainnet.Contract.GetContractAsync("contract-hash...");

// Get contracts
var contracts = await client.Mainnet.Contract.GetContractsAsync(new ContractsRequestParameters());

// Get contract types
var types = await client.Mainnet.Contract.GetContractTypesAsync();

// Get contract entry points
var entryPoints = await client.Mainnet.Contract.GetContractEntryPointsAsync("contract-hash...");

// Get entry point costs
var costs = await client.Mainnet.Contract.GetContractEntryPointCostsAsync(
    "contract-hash...",
    "entry_point_name");

// Get contract package
var package = await client.Mainnet.Contract.GetContractPackageAsync("contract-package-hash...");

// Get account's contract packages
var packages = await client.Mainnet.Contract.GetAccountContractPackagesAsync("01publicKey...");
```

### NFT (Non-Fungible Tokens)
```csharp
// Get single NFT
var nft = await client.Mainnet.NFT.GetNFTAsync("contract-package-hash...", "token-id");

// Get unscoped NFT list across the whole network (v2.0.0 SDK)
var allNfts = await client.Mainnet.NFT.GetNFTsAsync(new NFTsRequestParameters
{
    FilterParameters = new NFTsFilterParameters
    {
        ContractPackageHash = "pkg1...",  // optional — narrow to a collection
        OwnerHash = "hash1...",            // optional — filter by owner (account or contract)
        FromBlockHeight = "7000000",
        ToBlockHeight = "7600000"
    },
    OptionalParameters = new NFTOptionalParameters
    {
        ContractPackage = true,
        OwnerCsprName = true  // new in v2.0.0 — pull the owner's CSPR.name when available
    }
});

// Get account's NFTs
var nfts = await client.Mainnet.NFT.GetAccountNFTsAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new NFTAccountRequestParameters
    {
        OptionalParameters = new NFTOptionalParameters
        {
            OffchainMetadata = true
        }
    });

// Get contract package NFTs
var collectionNfts = await client.Mainnet.NFT.GetContractPackageNFTsAsync(
    "contract-package-hash...",
    new NFTContractPackageRequestParameters());

// Get NFT actions (transfers, mints, burns)
var actions = await client.Mainnet.NFT.GetAccountNFTActionsAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new NFTAccountActionsRequestParameters());

// Get NFT ownership
var ownership = await client.Mainnet.NFT.GetAccountNFTOwnershipAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new NFTAccountOwnershipRequestParameters());

// Get supported NFT standards
var standards = await client.Mainnet.NFT.GetNFTStandardsAsync();

// Get NFT action types
var actionTypes = await client.Mainnet.NFT.GetNFTActionTypesAsync();
```

### FT (Fungible Tokens)
```csharp
// Get fungible token actions
var actions = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFungibleTokenActionsAsync(
    new FTActionRequestParameters());

// Get account's FT actions
var accountActions = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetAccountFungibleTokenActionsAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new FTAccountActionRequestParameters());

// Get account's FT ownership (balances)
var balances = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetAccountFungibleTokenOwnershipAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new FTAccountOwnershipRequestParameters());

// Get contract package FT ownership
var holders = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetContractPackageFungibleTokenOwnershipAsync(
    "contract-package-hash...",
    new FTContractPackageOwnershipRequestParameters());

// Get FT action types (Mint, Transfer, Approve, Burn)
var actionTypes = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFTTokenActionTypesAsync();

// Get latest FT rate (currency_id required)
var latestRate = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFTRateLatestAsync(
    "contract-package-hash...",
    new FTRateFilterParameters { CurrencyId = "1" });

// Get historical FT rates
var rates = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFTRatesAsync(
    "contract-package-hash...",
    new FTRateRequestParameters { FilterParameters = new FTRateFilterParameters { CurrencyId = "1" } });

// Get latest daily FT rate
var dailyRate = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFTDailyRateLatestAsync(
    "contract-package-hash...",
    new FTRateFilterParameters { CurrencyId = "1" });

// Get historical daily FT rates
var dailyRates = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFTDailyRatesAsync(
    "contract-package-hash...",
    new FTDailyRateRequestParameters());

// Get latest FT DEX rate (token-to-token)
var dexRate = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFTDexRateLatestAsync(
    "source-contract-package-hash...",
    new FTDexRateFilterParameters { TargetContractPackageHash = "target-hash..." });

// Get historical FT DEX rates
var dexRates = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFTDexRatesAsync(
    "source-contract-package-hash...",
    new FTDexRateRequestParameters());

// Get latest daily FT DEX rate
var dailyDexRate = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFTDailyDexRateLatestAsync(
    "source-contract-package-hash...",
    new FTDexRateFilterParameters { TargetContractPackageHash = "target-hash..." });

// Get historical daily FT DEX rates
var dailyDexRates = await client.Mainnet.FT.GetFTDailyDexRatesAsync(
    "source-contract-package-hash...",
    new FTDailyDexRateRequestParameters());
```

### Bidder
```csharp
// Get bidder info
var bidder = await client.Mainnet.Bidder.GetBidderAsync(
    "01publicKey...",
    new BidderRequestParameters());

// Get all bidders
var bidders = await client.Mainnet.Bidder.GetBiddersAsync(new BiddersRequestParameters
{
    FilterParameters = new BiddersFilterParameters
    {
        AuctionStatus = AuctionStatus.ActiveValidator
    }
});
```

### Rate
```csharp
// Get current CSPR rate
var rate = await client.Mainnet.Rate.GetCurrentCurrencyRateAsync("usd");

// Get historical rates
var history = await client.Mainnet.Rate.GetHistoricalCurrencyRatesAsync(
    "usd",
    new RateHistoricalRequestParameters());

// Get supported currencies
var currencies = await client.Mainnet.Rate.GetCurrenciesAsync();
```

### Supply
```csharp
// Get CSPR supply info
var supply = await client.Mainnet.Supply.GetSupplyAsync();
```

### Auction
```csharp
// Get auction metrics
var metrics = await client.Mainnet.Auction.GetAuctionMetricsAsync();
```

### Centralized Account
```csharp
// Get exchange/service account info
var info = await client.Mainnet.CentralizedAccount.GetCentralizedAccountInfoAsync("account-hash...");

// Get all centralized accounts
var accounts = await client.Mainnet.CentralizedAccount.GetCentralizedAccountInfosAsync(
    new CentralizedAccountInfoRequestParameters());
```

### Dex
```csharp
// Get list of DEX platforms
var dexes = await client.Mainnet.Dex.GetDexesAsync();
// Returns ListResponse<DexData> with id (int?) and name (string)
```

### Swap
```csharp
// Get paginated list of token swaps/trades
var swaps = await client.Mainnet.Swap.GetSwapsAsync(new SwapRequestParameters
{
    PageSize = 25,
    FilterParameters = new SwapFilterParameters
    {
        ContractPackageHash = new List<string> { "contract-package-hash..." },
        DexIds = new List<string> { "1" }
    },
    SortingParameters = new SwapSortingParameters
    {
        OrderByTimestamp = true,
        SortType = SortType.Descending
    },
    OptionalParameters = new SwapOptionalParameters
    {
        FromTokenContractPackage = true,
        ToTokenContractPackage = true
    }
});
```

### CsprName
```csharp
// Resolve a CSPR.name to an account hash
var resolution = await client.Mainnet.CsprName.GetCsprNameResolutionAsync("example.cspr");
// Returns Response<CsprNameResolutionData> with name_token_id, name, resolved_hash, is_primary, expires_at
```

### AwaitingDeploy
```csharp
// Create an awaiting deploy (multisig workflow)
var createRequest = new CreateAwaitingDeployRequest
{
    Deploy = JObject.Parse("{ /* raw deploy JSON */ }")
};
var created = await client.Mainnet.AwaitingDeploy.CreateAwaitingDeployAsync(createRequest);

// Add approval signatures to an awaiting deploy
var approval = new AddApprovalRequest
{
    Signer = "01publicKey...",
    Signature = "signature-hex..."
};
var approved = await client.Mainnet.AwaitingDeploy.AddAwaitingDeployApprovalsAsync(
    "deploy-hash...", approval);

// Get an awaiting deploy by hash
var deploy = await client.Mainnet.AwaitingDeploy.GetAwaitingDeployAsync("deploy-hash...");
// Returns Response<AwaitingDeployData> with deploy (JObject)
```

---

## Response Types

### Single Item Response
```csharp
Response<T> response = await client.Mainnet.Account.GetAccountAsync("01abc...");
AccountData account = response.Data;
```

### List Response
```csharp
ListResponse<T> response = await client.Mainnet.NFT.GetNFTStandardsAsync();
List<NFTStandardData> standards = response.Data;
```

### Paginated Response
```csharp
PaginatedResponse<T> response = await client.Mainnet.Account.GetAccountsAsync(params);
List<AccountData> accounts = response.Data;
int totalItems = response.ItemCount;
int totalPages = response.PageCount;
```

---

## Parameter System

### Pagination (all list endpoints)
```csharp
var params = new AccountsRequestParameters
{
    PageNumber = 1,      // Default: 1
    PageSize = 50        // Default: 10, Max: 250
};
```

### Filtering
Filter results by specific criteria:
```csharp
FilterParameters = new ValidatorsFilterParameters
{
    IsActive = true,
    PublicKeys = new List<string> { "01abc...", "01def..." }
}
```

### Sorting
```csharp
SortingParameters = new AccountsSortingParameters
{
    OrderByBalance = true,           // or OrderByTotalBalance
    SortType = SortType.Descending   // or SortType.Ascending
}
```

### Optional Includes
Request additional data fields:
```csharp
OptionalParameters = new AccountsOptionalParameters
{
    AuctionStatus = true,
    DelegatedBalance = true,
    UndelegatingBalance = true,
    StakedBalance = true,
    AccountInfo = true,
    CentralizedAccountInfo = true
}
```

---

## Key Data Models

All monetary/stake fields are **strings** on the wire (since API v2.4.3) to preserve uint64 values that overflow `System.UInt64.MaxValue`. Parse via `BigInteger.Parse` when you need to compare or do arithmetic.

### AccountData
```csharp
string PublicKey
string AccountHash
string MainPurseUref
string Balance                          // main-purse liquid balance, string
string AuctionStatus
string DelegatedBalance                 // string
string UndelegatedBalance               // string
string StakedBalance                    // string
string UndelegatingBalance              // string — pending-release funds (v2.5.1)
AccountInfoData AccountInfo
CentralizedAccountInfoData CentralizedAccountInfo
string CsprName                         // v2.1.0 — CSPR.name includer
uint? Rank                              // ranking includer
```

### ValidatorData
```csharp
uint? Rank
uint? EraId
string PublicKey
bool IsActive
float? Fee
ulong? DelegatorsNumber
string SelfStake                        // string
string DelegatorsStake                  // string
string TotalStake                       // string
string BidAmount                        // v2.0.5 — bid without affiliated-account bonus
uint? ReservedSlots                     // Casper 2.0
string MinimumDelegationAmount
string MaximumDelegationAmount
string PendingUnstakingAmount           // v2.0.5
string SelfShare                        // string percentage
string NetworkShare                     // string percentage
AccountInfoData AccountInfo
CentralizedAccountInfoData CentralizedAccountInfo
ValidatorPerformanceData AveragePerformance
string CsprName                         // v2.1.0
```

### BidderData
Same shape as ValidatorData (string stakes, Casper 2.0 fields, CsprName).

### BlockData
```csharp
ulong? BlockHeight
string BlockHash
string ParentBlockHash
string StateRootHash
uint? EraId
string ProposerPublicKey
ushort? NativeTransfersNumber
ushort? ContractCallsNumber
bool IsSwitchBlock
uint? GasPrice                          // Casper 2.0
byte? VersionId                         // Casper 2.0 block header
ushort? AuctionTxnNumber                // Casper 2.0 txn buckets
ushort? InstallUpgradeTxnNumber
ushort? SmallTxnNumber
ushort? MediumTxnNumber
ushort? LargeTxnNumber
DateTime? Timestamp
AccountInfoData ProposerAccountInfo
CentralizedAccountInfoData ProposerCentralizedAccountInfo
string ProposerCsprName                 // v2.1.0
```

### DeployData
```csharp
string DeployHash
string BlockHash
ulong? BlockHeight
string CallerPublicKey
string CallerHash                       // v2.0.12
string CallerCsprName                   // v2.1.0
byte? ExecutionTypeId
byte? VersionId                         // Casper 2.0 — 1 = deploy, 2 = transaction
byte? PricingModeId                     // Casper 2.0
ulong? GasPriceLimit                    // Casper 2.0
bool? IsStandardPayment                 // Casper 2.0
byte? RuntimeTypeId                     // Casper 2.0 — VM v1 / WASM v2
string ConsumedGas                      // string
string RefundAmount                     // v2.0.12 — string
string ContractPackageHash
string ContractHash
uint? EntryPointId
ArgsData Args
string PaymentAmount                    // string
string Cost                             // string
string ErrorMessage
string Status
DateTime? Timestamp
ContractPackageData ContractPackage
ContractData Contract
EntryPointData ContractEntrypoint
float? Rate
List<TransferData> Transfers
List<NFTTokenActionData> NFTTokenAction
List<FTTokenActionData> FTTokenAction
```

### NFTTokenData
```csharp
string ContractPackageHash
ulong BlockHeight
ArgsData OnchainMetadata
ArgsData OffchainMetadata
uint OffchainMetadataStatus
bool IsBurned
string OwnerHash
OwnerType OwnerType                     // 0 = account, 1 = contract
DateTime? Timestamp
string TokenId
byte TokenStandardId                    // 1 = CEP-47, 2 = CEP-78, 3 = CEP-95
string TrackingId
ContractPackageData ContractPackage
string OwnerPublicKey
```

### FTOwnershipData
```csharp
string OwnerHash                        // account or contract hash
string ContractPackageHash
string Balance                          // string
```

### DelegationData
```csharp
string PublicKey                        // null when delegator is a purse — check DelegatorIdentifierTypeId
string ValidatorPublicKey
string Stake                            // string
string BondingPurse
string DelegatorIdentifier              // v2.1.0 — public key or purse uref
int? DelegatorIdentifierTypeId          // v2.1.0 — 0 = account, 1 = purse
AccountInfoData AccountInfo
AccountInfoData ValidatorAccountInfo
CentralizedAccountInfoData CentralizedAccountInfo
BidderData Bidder                       // v2.1.0 — `bidder` includer
string CsprName                         // v2.1.0
string ValidatorCsprName                // v2.1.0
```

### UndelegationData (new in v2.0.0 SDK)
```csharp
string PublicKey                        // null for purse delegators
string ValidatorPublicKey
string Amount                           // string — motes being undelegated
string BondingPurse
string DelegatorIdentifier
int DelegatorIdentifierTypeId           // 0 = account, 1 = purse
ulong? EraOfCreation                    // released 7 eras later
DateTime? Timestamp
AccountInfoData AccountInfo
AccountInfoData ValidatorAccountInfo
CentralizedAccountInfoData CentralizedAccountInfo
```

### TransferData
```csharp
ulong? Id                               // caller-supplied transfer id
string DeployHash
ulong? BlockHeight
string TransformKey
string InitiatorAccountHash
string FromPurse
string ToPurse
string ToAccountHash
string Amount                           // string
DateTime? Timestamp
string InitiatorPublicKey
string ToPublicKey
string FromPursePublicKey
string ToPursePublicKey
AccountInfoData ToAccountInfo
CentralizedAccountInfoData ToCentralizedAccountInfo
AccountInfoData FromPurseAccountInfo
CentralizedAccountInfoData FromPurseCentralizedAccountInfo
AccountInfoData ToPurseAccountInfo
CentralizedAccountInfoData ToPurseCentralizedAccountInfo
float? Rate
ulong? TransferIndex                    // monotonic indexer id (distinct from caller Id)
string InitiatorCsprName                // v2.1.0 — the 4 CSPR.name fields below
string ToCsprName
string FromPurseCsprName
string ToPurseCsprName
```

### SupplyData
```csharp
string Token                            // "CSPR"
ulong? Total                            // stays numeric on the wire
ulong? Circulating
double? TotalAnnualIssuance             // v2.4.0
double? AnnualEcosystemSustainIssuance  // v2.8.0
double? AnnualStakingRewardsIssuance    // v2.8.0
double? AnnualIssuance                  // kept for backward compatibility
long? Timestamp                         // Unix seconds (NOT an ISO string)
```

### ContractPackageData
```csharp
string ContractPackageHash
string OwnerPublicKey
string OwnerHash                        // v2.0.20 — populated when owner is not identified by public key
string Name
string Description
MetadataData Metadata
int? LatestVersionContractTypeId
DateTime Timestamp
string IconUrl
string WebsiteUrl                       // v2.0.12
int? DeploysNumber                      // function includer
bool? IsContractInfoApproved
bool? IsFeatured
string CoingeckoId                      // when tracked by CoinGecko
string OwnerCsprName                    // v2.1.0
List<JObject> TokenMarketData           // v2.9.0 — shape depends on currency/dex passed to the includer
JObject CoingeckoData                   // v2.1.0 — raw CoinGecko payload
JObject FriendlymarketData              // v2.1.1
JObject CsprtradeData                   // v2.7.0
```

---

## Enums

### SortType
```csharp
SortType.Ascending   // ASC
SortType.Descending  // DESC
```

### AuctionStatus
```csharp
AuctionStatus.InactiveBidder
AuctionStatus.ActiveBidder
AuctionStatus.ActiveValidator
AuctionStatus.PendingValidator
```

### HashType / OwnerType
```csharp
HashType.Account
HashType.Contract

OwnerType.Account
OwnerType.Contract
```

---

## Error Handling

```csharp
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Errors;

try
{
    var account = await client.Mainnet.Account.GetAccountAsync("01abc...");
}
catch (UnauthorizedException)
{
    // 401 - Invalid or missing API key
}
catch (NotFoundException)
{
    // 404 - Resource not found
}
catch (InvalidParamException)
{
    // 400 - Invalid parameters
}
catch (AccessDeniedException)
{
    // 403 - Access denied
}
catch (InternalServerErrorException)
{
    // 500 - Server error
}
```

---

## Advanced Configuration

### Custom HttpClient
```csharp
var httpClient = new HttpClient();
httpClient.Timeout = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(60);

var client = new CasperCloudRestClient(config, httpClient);
```

### With Logging
```csharp
var loggerFactory = LoggerFactory.Create(builder =>
    builder.AddConsole().SetMinimumLevel(LogLevel.Debug));

var client = new CasperCloudRestClient(config, loggerFactory: loggerFactory);
```

---

## Streaming API (WebSocket)

Real-time subscriptions via `CasperCloudSocketClient`. Same shape as the REST client: pick a network, pick a stream, call `SubscribeAsync`.

### Quick Start
```csharp
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Clients;
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Objects.Config;
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Objects.Socket;
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Parameters.Socket;

var socket = new CasperCloudSocketClient(new CasperCloudClientConfig("your-api-key"));

using var cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
await socket.Testnet.Block.SubscribeAsync(
    parameters: null,
    onMessage: msg =>
    {
        Console.WriteLine($"{msg.Action} @ {msg.Data.BlockHash}");
        return Task.CompletedTask;
    },
    cancellationToken: cts.Token);
```

### Available Streams
Access via `socket.Mainnet.{Stream}` or `socket.Testnet.{Stream}`:

| Stream | Actions | Filters | Payload |
|--------|---------|---------|---------|
| `.AccountBalance` | `updated` | `AccountHash`, `PublicKey` | `AccountBalanceStreamData` |
| `.Block` | `created` | `ProposerPublicKey` | `BlockData` |
| `.Contract` | `created` | `ContractPackageHash`, `DeployHash` | `ContractData` |
| `.ContractPackage` | `created`, `updated` | `ContractPackageHash`, `OwnerPublicKey` | `ContractPackageData` |
| `.ContractEvent` | `emitted` | `ContractHash` **or** `ContractPackageHash` (required), `IncludeRawData` | `ContractEventStreamData` |
| `.Deploy` | `created` | `ContractPackageHash`, `ContractHash`, `CallerPublicKey`, `ContractEntrypointId`, `DeployHash` | `DeployData` |
| `.FTTokenAction` | `created` | `ContractPackageHash`, `OwnerHash` | `FTTokenActionData` |
| `.NFT` | `created`, `updated` | `ContractPackageHash`, `OwnerHash` | `NFTTokenData` |
| `.NFTAction` | `created` | `ContractPackageHash`, `OwnerHash` | `NFTTokenActionData` |
| `.Transfer` | `created` | `AccountHash`, `PublicKey` | `TransferData` |

### Envelope
Every message is delivered as `WebSocketMessage<T>`:
```csharp
public class WebSocketMessage<T>
{
    public string Action { get; set; }        // "created" / "updated" / "emitted"
    public T Data { get; set; }               // the typed payload
    public JObject Extra { get; set; }        // per-stream metadata (deploy_hash, event_id, etc.)
    public DateTime? Timestamp { get; set; }  // when the triggering event occurred
}
```

### Filtering
All filter fields are `List<string>` and comma-joined in the URL. `null` means no filter:
```csharp
await socket.Testnet.Deploy.SubscribeAsync(
    new DeployStreamParameters
    {
        CallerPublicKey = new List<string> { "01abc..." },
        ContractPackageHash = new List<string> { "pkg1...", "pkg2..." }
    },
    onMessage: msg => { Handle(msg); return Task.CompletedTask; },
    cancellationToken: ct);
```

`ContractEventStreamParameters` requires exactly one of `ContractHash` or `ContractPackageHash` — the client throws `ArgumentException` at `BuildUri` time if neither is provided, so misuse fails fast instead of hitting a 400 on the upgrade.

### Auto-Reconnect
Opt in via `StreamReconnectPolicy` — matches the CSPR docs' guidance that clients need reconnect logic:
```csharp
var socket = new CasperCloudSocketClient(
    new CasperCloudClientConfig("your-api-key"),
    persistentSessionId: "my-consumer-id",             // replays queued messages across reconnects (Beta, paid tiers)
    reconnectPolicy: new StreamReconnectPolicy
    {
        Enabled = true,
        InitialDelay = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(1),        // defaults shown
        MaxDelay = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(60),
        BackoffMultiplier = 2.0,
        JitterFactor = 0.25,                           // ±25% on each computed delay
        MaxRetries = -1                                // -1 = unlimited
    });

await socket.Testnet.Transfer.SubscribeAsync(
    parameters: null,
    onMessage: msg => { Handle(msg); return Task.CompletedTask; },
    onError: ex => { Log(ex); return Task.CompletedTask; },                  // parse errors; subscription keeps running
    onReconnecting: (ex, attempt) =>
    {
        Console.WriteLine($"reconnecting attempt {attempt}: {ex?.Message}");
        return Task.CompletedTask;
    },
    cancellationToken: ct);
```

**Default retry gate:** retries `WebSocketException`, `IOException`, `HttpRequestException`, `TimeoutException`, and clean server disconnects; refuses `ArgumentException` and `InvalidOperationException`. Override with `ShouldReconnect = (ex, attempt) => ...` for custom rules.

**Behavior when policy is disabled (default):** single attempt, returns on clean server close, throws on transport failure — the legacy behavior.

### Runtime Network Selection
Same pattern as REST — both `Mainnet` and `Testnet` return `INetworkSocketEndpoint`:
```csharp
bool useTestnet = true;
var network = useTestnet ? socket.Testnet : socket.Mainnet;
await network.Block.SubscribeAsync(parameters: null, onMessage, cancellationToken: ct);
```

### Stopping a Subscription
`SubscribeAsync` returns a `Task` that completes only on cancellation (or, if reconnect is off, on server close). Stop by cancelling the CTS:
```csharp
cts.Cancel(); // task exits with OperationCanceledException
```

### Background Execution
Don't `await` the subscription task if you want it running in the background:
```csharp
var cts = new CancellationTokenSource();
var subscription = socket.Testnet.Block.SubscribeAsync(
    parameters: null,
    onMessage: msg => { Handle(msg); return Task.CompletedTask; },
    cancellationToken: cts.Token);

// ... do other work ...

cts.Cancel();
try { await subscription; } catch (OperationCanceledException) { /* expected */ }
```

---

## Complete Example

```csharp
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Clients;
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Objects.Config;
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Parameters.Wrapper.Validator;
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Parameters.Sorting.Validator;
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Parameters.OptionalParameters.Validator;
using CSPR.Cloud.Net.Enums;

var config = new CasperCloudClientConfig("your-api-key");
var client = new CasperCloudRestClient(config);

// Get top 10 validators by total stake with account info + CSPR.name
var validators = await client.Mainnet.Validator.GetValidatorsAsync(new ValidatorsRequestParameters
{
    PageNumber = 1,
    PageSize = 10,
    FilterParameters = new ValidatorsFilterParameters { IsActive = true },
    SortingParameters = new ValidatorsSortingParameters
    {
        OrderByTotalStake = true,
        SortType = SortType.Descending
    },
    OptionalParameters = new ValidatorsOptionalParameters
    {
        AccountInfo = true,
        CsprName = true            // v2.1.0 — CSPR.name includer
    }
});

foreach (var validator in validators.Data)
{
    // TotalStake is string on the wire (v2.4.3 — avoids uint64 overflow). Parse via BigInteger.
    var stakeMotes = System.Numerics.BigInteger.Parse(validator.TotalStake ?? "0");
    var stakeCspr = (decimal)stakeMotes / 1_000_000_000m;

    var displayName = validator.CsprName
        ?? validator.AccountInfo?.Info?.Name
        ?? validator.PublicKey;

    Console.WriteLine($"{displayName}");
    Console.WriteLine($"  Stake: {stakeCspr:N0} CSPR");
    Console.WriteLine($"  Delegators: {validator.DelegatorsNumber}");
    Console.WriteLine($"  Fee: {validator.Fee}%");
}

Console.WriteLine($"\nTotal validators: {validators.ItemCount}");
```

---

## API Reference Links
- CSPR Cloud API Docs: https://docs.cspr.cloud
- Casper Network: https://casper.network
